modules.name: tests_standalone.pw
documentation: pytest playwright currently doesn't support asyncio
so i won't write pytest based tests for it

class_variables.name: cookit.common.data.pagination.IterPFKwargs.page_size
documentation: 单次查询的数量，默认为 `100`

class_variables.name: cookit.common.data.pagination.IterPFKwargs.offset
documentation: 查询的初始偏移量，默认为 `0`

class_variables.name: cookit.common.data.pagination.IterPFKwargs.delay
documentation: 每次查询后的延迟时间，单位秒，默认为 `0`

class_variables.name: cookit.common.data.pagination.IterPFKwargs.max_size
documentation: 最大结果数，返回的结果数永远不会超过这个值，默认为 `0`，即不限制
